name: video-audit-electron
description: Private macOS Electron version of Video Audit.
author: Josh Levy

scripts.dev:build: npm run build && npm run build:mac && npm run dev
scripts.icons: mkdir -p assets/icon.iconset && sips -z 16 16 assets/icon-source.png --out assets/icon.iconset/icon_16x16.png && sips -z 32 32 assets/icon-source.png --out assets/icon.iconset/icon_16x16@2x.png && sips -z 32 32 assets/icon-source.png --out assets/icon.iconset/icon_32x32.png && sips -z 64 64 assets/icon-source.png --out assets/icon.iconset/icon_32x32@2x.png && sips -z 128 128 assets/icon-source.png --out assets/icon.iconset/icon_128x128.png && sips -z 256 256 assets/icon-source.png --out assets/icon.iconset/icon_128x128@2x.png && sips -z 256 256 assets/icon-source.png --out assets/icon.iconset/icon_256x256.png && sips -z 512 512 assets/icon-source.png --out assets/icon.iconset/icon_256x256@2x.png && sips -z 512 512 assets/icon-source.png --out assets/icon.iconset/icon_512x512.png && sips -z 1024 1024 assets/icon-source.png --out assets/icon.iconset/icon_512x512@2x.png && iconutil -c icns assets/icon.iconset -o assets/icon.icns && cp assets/icon-source.png assets/icon.png
